description_long: This is a short, rectangular fence section composed of evenly spaced vertical slats connected by two horizontal rails at the top and bottom. The slats are thick and robust, with a uniform width and a muted, grayish-green color that suggests a painted or coated finish. The top edge of the fence is flat, with each slat ending at the same height, creating a clean and orderly appearance. The ends of the horizontal rails extend slightly beyond the outermost slats, giving the fence a framed look. There are no visible decorative elements, caps, or embellishments, making the design simple and functional. This type of fence is commonly used in urban parks, gardens, or as a boundary marker along sidewalks and residential areas.
description: A simple, rectangular fence with evenly spaced vertical slats and two horizontal rails, finished in a muted grayish-green color. The design is clean, flat-topped, and functional, with no decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing all vertical slats and both horizontal rails, highlighting the flat top and uniform spacing.
description_view_1: Side view showing the thin profile of the fence, with slats and rails aligned in a narrow plane.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the same arrangement of slats and rails with a clear, flat top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the alignment of the slats and rails.
